name: Odette
intro: Odette, the Swan Princess, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Lakeshore Ambience
abilities.description: Buff After each skill cast, Odette's next Basic Attack or skill will cast a sound wave that rebounds between her and enemies, each bounce dealing 140 (+4 × Hero Level) (+50% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage . Skill terms Magic Basic Attack Deal Magic DMG to enemies. It can trigger ATK Effect and Magic Lifesteal.

abilities.name: Avian Authority
abilities.description: AOE Slow Odette concentrates energy to summon a swan to attack enemies, dealing 300–550 (+150% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage and slowing them by 30%. Lasts 2 seconds. Skill terms Magic Skill Deal Magic DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp. Movement Speed Movement Speed on the battlefield. Usually Calculated and Actual Movement Speed is equal. But when Movement Speed is below 230 or over 420 both Slowdown and Speedup Effect will decay. Calculated Movement Speed = Basic Movement Speed × (100% + All Speedup Effect% - All Slowdown Effect%).

abilities.name: Blue Nova
abilities.description: CC Damage Odette releases a set of magic energy balls forward, dealing 250–400 (+50% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to the enemy hit and immobilizing them for 1.5 seconds. Another energy ball will then spawn and attack a nearby enemy (prioritizes enemy heroes), dealing 250–400 (+50% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage and immobilizing them for 1.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Swan Song
abilities.description: Mobility Burst Odette leaps in a designated direction, gains a 1400–1800 (+150% Total Magic Power) shield , and begins gathering energy, dealing 2400–3200 (+900% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage in total to enemies within the area for 5 seconds. (She deals damage every 0.5s). The rebounding speed and count of Lakeshore Ambience 's sound wave in the area are also enhanced when the skill is active. This skill requires constant channeling and will be interrupted if Odette is controlled by high lvl CC such as Suppression , affected by airborne , is transformed or etc or when Odette performs other actions. Skill terms Magic Skill Deal Magic DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp. Shield Special HP is preferentially deducted when taking damage. The shield with shorter duration or lower points is usually preferentially deducted when multiple shields are stacked.
